<a id="class-visualshadernodedeterminant"></a>

# VisualShaderNodeDeterminant

**Inherits:** [VisualShaderNode](class_visualshadernode.md#class-visualshadernode) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Calculates the determinant of a [Transform3D](class_transform3d.md#class-transform3d) within the visual shader graph.

## Description

Translates to `determinant(x)` in the shader language.
